# AI Workplace Productivity Assistant

> AI-powered tools to help professionals automate and streamline workplace tasks.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Overview of all productivity tools with quick access to each module.
- [Smart Email Generator](/email): Generate professional email drafts based on context, tone, and recipient.
- [Meeting Notes Summarizer](/meeting): Summarize meeting transcripts with key decisions and action items.
- [AI Task Planner](/planner): Create prioritized daily, weekly, or monthly task schedules.
- [Research Assistant](/research): Research topics and compile structured summaries with insights.
- [AI Chatbot](/chat): Conversational AI assistant for workplace productivity queries.

## Features

- Generate emails in formal, casual, or persuasive tones
- Extract action items and deadlines from meeting transcripts
- Create prioritized task schedules with productivity tips
- Conduct AI-powered research with structured findings
- Chat with an AI assistant for general workplace help
- All AI outputs are editable and copyable
- No account required — data stored locally in your browser
- Responsible AI disclaimer prominently displayed
